name.description: The name of the Memcache instance.

authorized_network.description: The full name of the GCE network to connect the instance to. If not provided, 'default' will be used.

labels.description: A set of key/value label pairs to assign to the Memcache instance.

cpu_count.description: Number of CPUs per node in the Memcache instance. Must be even number or 1.

memory_size_mb.description: Memory size in MiB for each Memcache node. Valid range

node_count.description: Number of nodes in the memcache instance. Must be within Range. [1, 20]

memcache_version.description: The major version of Memcached software. If not provided, latest supported version will be used. Currently the latest supported major version is MEMCACHE_1_5. The minor version will be automatically determined by our system based on the latest supported minor version. Default value is MEMCACHE_1_5

maintenance_policy.type: list(object({ day: string, duration: number, hours: optional(number), minutes: optional(number), seconds: optional(number), nanos: optional(number) }))
maintenance_policy.description: Maintenance policy for an instance. If no values are set, maintenance will be scheduled at midnight on the day selected in UTC. Duration must be within [10,800 - 28,800] and must end with 's'.
